title: Selling Beats Online with Crypto Payments Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in Nigeria or another country with PayPal restrictions? Do you want to sell beats online without relying on Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip? Unchained Commerce is here to help. We provide the infrastructure for you to sell digital products, including beats, directly to your audience using cryptocurrency payments. With our platform, you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies, deliver your products instantly, and focus on creating more music.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling beats online with crypto payments is a game-changer for digital creators who can't use traditional payment processors due to geographical restrictions, banking limitations, or Know Your Customer (KYC) requirements. It allows you to reach a broader audience, increase sales, and diversify your revenue streams. By using cryptocurrency payments, you can also reduce your transaction fees and avoid the risk of account freezes or shutdowns.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Our platform, Web3 Wallet Connect, integrates your website with the NOWPayments payment processor, enabling seamless crypto transactions. When a buyer pays for your beats, the funds are instantly converted to USD, and the product is delivered automatically. You don't need to worry about payment processing, KYC verification, or account management. Our system takes care of everything, so you can focus on creating more music.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce is designed for digital creators who want to sell digital products, including beats, music, and other digital goods, without relying on traditional payment processors. If you're an artist, producer, or music label looking to monetize your creations, our platform is for you. We cater to creators in countries with PayPal restrictions, such as Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and many others.
You can sell beats online with crypto payments using Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our platform consists of several key components: the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and the Admin Dashboard. The Core Shop Engine handles automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Web3 Wallet Connect provides frontend wallet integration, multi-chain QR codes, and live price feeds. The Admin Dashboard offers transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. Together, these components enable you to sell beats online with crypto payments efficiently and effectively.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start selling beats online with crypto payments, follow these steps: create an account on Unchained Commerce, set up your shop, and integrate Web3 Wallet Connect. Choose your payment processor, configure your product prices, and start promoting your digital goods. Once you receive a payment, our system will deliver your beats automatically, and you'll receive your revenue in USD. With Unchained Commerce, you can focus on creating music while we handle the rest.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
By using cryptocurrency payments, you can reduce your transaction fees and avoid the risk of account freezes or shutdowns.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for other ways to sell digital products without relying on PayPal or Stripe, consider using Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, which supports multiple cryptocurrencies and enables instant automated delivery. You can also explore other digital download stores that accept crypto payments, such as https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Our platform is designed to help you reach a broader audience and increase your sales without the hassle of traditional payment processors.
Your Action Checklist

Configure your product prices, choose your payment processor, and promote your digital goods to attract buyers.
